user_query: Show me everything related to Belgium across all our systems.

plan.query: Show me everything related to Belgium across all our systems.
plan.reasoning: The user is requesting a comprehensive overview of all information related to Belgium, necessitating the use of all available agents to gather relevant data from emails, calendar events, CRM details, and location information.

steps.task: Retrieve any emails and calendar events related to Belgium.
Fetch all accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, and cases related to Belgium.
Get all location data and catalog items related to Belgium.

plan.synthesis: Aggregate the results from steps 1, 2, and 3 to provide a comprehensive overview of all data related to Belgium.

invoked_agents.input: Retrieve any emails and calendar events related to Belgium.
Fetch all accounts, contacts, leads, opportunities, and cases related to Belgium.
